autoBlog.title: Auto-blogger (secured)
autoBlog.lead: Generate a draft article as Markdown. Requires server environment variables; requests without the correct bearer token are rejected.
autoBlog.topicPlaceholder: e.g. CSP pitfalls in Next.js App Router
autoBlog.unauthorized: This panel is disabled until AUTO_BLOG_PANEL_SECRET is configured and you sign in with it.
autoBlog.hint: Set AUTO_BLOG_PANEL_SECRET in .env.local. For AI output, add OPENAI_API_KEY. The public API uses Authorization: Bearer AUTO_BLOG_SECRET.

admin.title: Admin panel
admin.lead: Create and publish blog posts from this secured panel.
admin.locked: Panel is unavailable until D1 binding is configured.
admin.setupLead: First use only: create username and password (stored in D1).
admin.setupInvalid: Username must be at least 3 chars, password at least 8 chars.
admin.bulkLead: Generate multiple scheduled drafts from a topic list.
admin.bulkUseWeb: Web research mode (no LLM API key; fetches public HTTPS pages and writes SEO drafts in EN + TR).
admin.bulkWebSources: Source URLs (one HTTPS URL per line, max 5)
admin.bulkWebSourcesLead: Only use pages you may cite; respect robots.txt and copyright. Drafts are synthesized summaries, not copies.
admin.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this post?
admin.cronLead: Track scheduled publish runs and trigger manually.
admin.builderLead: Elementor-style blocks + AI fill for faster drafting.
admin.builderFilled: Editor fields populated from AI draft.
admin.marketingLead: Manage ad and analytics IDs from panel (stored in D1).
admin.customAiApiKeyHintSet: Leave empty to keep existing key
admin.customAiApiKeyHintEmpty: Paste key to enable custom AI provider
